---
title: "Premier League: The Growing Divide"
description: "Analyzing 33 seasons of title-winning and relegation survival points"
date: 2026-04-27
categories: [data-viz, sports, python]
image: thumbnail.png
format: 
  html:
    self-contained: true  # This helps ensure all JS is bundled in one file
execute:
  enabled: true
jupyter: python3
---

## Overview

An interactive analysis of how the gap between Premier League champions
and relegation survivors has grown from 1992 to 2025.

## Key Findings

- Title-winning points trend upward (+0.25 pts/season)
- Relegation survival points are flat or declining
- The gap has grown from ~35-50 pts to 50-65 pts

## Interactive Chart

{{< embed PremLeague.ipynb#fig-main >}}

## The Whole Project

{{< embed PremLeague.ipynb >}}

## Code

The full source notebook is available on
[GitHub](https://github.com/eschnitger/PremLeague).
